docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-22-2025 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,400.00 FILED BY SODIPE, OLUWAKEMI AYOMIDE AS TO DEFENDANT CHORENS, CASEY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-22-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SODIPE, OLUWAKEMI AYOMIDE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-22-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-22-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE JOSH M. FREDRICKS, PLAINTIFF OLUWAKEMI AYOMIDE SODIPE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CASEY CHORENS IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSH M. FREDRICKS; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SODIPE, OLUWAKEMI AYOMIDE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHORENS, CASEY $1,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHORENS, CASEY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $50.00 SERVED SEP-02-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHORENS, CASEY
